response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song 'オーケストラ' (Orchestra) by BiSH from on-screen Japanese text. 2. Identified the performers as a group of VTubers led by Yukizaki Riona. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics (Japanese) and English translation. 4. Created 2 scenes: an intro period (00:00-00:05) and the full performance (00:05-04:57). 5. Filled in all fields for the JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a group of 5 VTubers, including Yukizaki Riona, performing a choreographed song titled "Orchestra" (originally by BiSH). The video captures their coordinated singing and dancing on stage.

scenes.description: The video begins with the group standing on stage in the dark, preparing for their performance.
The group performs the song 'Orchestra' (originally by BiSH). Text on screen indicates songwriting credits for JxSxK and Kenta Matsukuma. The VTubers sing and dance together throughout this segment.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I looked up at the night sky
and the stars floating there,
and thought for a moment I heard your voice
Were they shining back then?
I suppose now
I’ll never know

Back then
you lied to me
and I didn’t question it
but I cried to myself, walking up that hill

From here onwards
I’ve accepted
the two of us being apart,
never seeing you again
My same old regrets are vanishing in the wind
I wanted to see
just a little more
of the side of you that you’d never show to anyone else
But time is silently sneering at me

I won’t forget
your hand in mine,
our voices laughing together
and all these tears flowing forward now
and the sound of my speaking voice, are an orchestra
You know we were parted so soon
I won’t forget
the voice of your “goodbye”
We should have been so close, but
the only connection we have now
is that sky above

Let’s trade
this night sky
for that 3am we threw away
like the fools we were
From here onwards
even if I might accept
letting you and all those years
be swept away in the flow of time
Our same old little jokes are vanishing into the city,
I wanted to show you
just a little more
of this part of me I’d never show to anyone else
But time is silently sneering at me

I want to say it clearly
and see your eyes looking into mine,
I suppose I can’t do that any more
But all the frustration
and the pain
are playing the sounds of this orchestra

Where are you now, what are you doing?
I know it’s my fault
that I don’t know any more
To live through days like this forever -
Dear god, if this is some kind of joke
then damn you

I won’t forget
your hand in mine,
our voices laughing together
and all these tears flowing forward now
and the sound of my speaking voice, are an orchestra
You know we were parted so soon
I won’t forget
the voice of your “goodbye”
We should have been so close, but
the only connection we have now
is that sky above
